tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators.

chunks.text: AutoStream Basic Plan: Price $29 per month. Includes 10 videos per month with a maximum resolution of 720p. Best suited for hobbyists and early-stage creators.
AutoStream Pro Plan: Price $79 per month. Includes unlimited videos per month, up to 4K resolution rendering, and AI-generated captions. Includes 24/7 priority support.
Refunds are available within the first 7 days of purchase. After 7 days, no refunds are issued under any circumstance.
24/7 customer support is available exclusively to Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive standard business-hours email support.
AutoStream provides automated video editing, AI captions (Pro only), multi-platform export for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn, plus scene detection and one-click highlight reels.
